---
title: "Download SRA Metabarcoding Data"
format: html

params:
  bioprojects: 
    - "PRJNA1458311"
  out_dir: "data/raw"
  n_max: 100
---

## Load packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
library(rentrez)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Query NCBI using NCBI

```{r}
if (!exists("params")) {
  params <- list(
    bioprojects = c("PRJNA1458311"),
    out_dir = "data/raw",
    n_max = 100
  )
}
```
```{r}
all_runs <- list()

for (proj in params$bioprojects) {
  message("Querying: ", proj)
  
  search <- entrez_search(
    db = "sra",
    term = proj,
    retmax = params$n_max
  )
  
  summaries <- entrez_summary(db = "sra", id = search$ids)
  
  runs <- summaries |>
    map_chr("runs") |>
    str_extract_all("SRR\\d+") |>
    unlist() |>
    unique()
  
  all_runs[[proj]] <- runs
}
```
